title: clerodendrum thouarsii
intro: Clerodendrum thouarsii, also known as the Pagoda flower or Glory flower, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum thouarsii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and skin infections.
